WITH store_sales_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_customer_sk,
        d_year,
        SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_total
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2000
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, d_year
),
catalog_sales_year AS (
    SELECT 
        cs_bill_customer_sk AS cs_customer_sk,
        d_year,
        SUM(cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_discount_amt) AS catalog_total
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold...

WITH sales_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ss.ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS store_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN cs.cs_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN cs.cs_ext_list_price - cs.cs_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_total
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill...
